name: StudioMCPHub
description: Creative AI tools and museum art datasets for autonomous agents. 24 MCP tools: image generation (SD 3.5 + Imagen 3), 5-model ESRGAN upscaling, tiered metadata enrichment, resize/convert, provenance registration, Arweave permanent storage, NFT minting, wallet storage, and 53K+ museum artworks from Alexandria Aeternum.

authSchemes.description: Pay per call with USDC on Base L2. No account needed. HTTP 402 flow.
GCX credits via Authorization: Bearer 0xWALLET header.
Credit card via Stripe PaymentIntent. $0.50 minimum per transaction.
Free tools (10 of 24) require no authentication.

skills.name: Search Tools
skills.description: Discover available tools by category or price without loading all schemas. Start here to save tokens.
examples: Search for free tools
Find creative tools under $0.50

skills.name: Get Tool Schema
skills.description: Get the full JSON Schema and usage examples for a specific tool.
examples: Get schema for generate_image

skills.name: Generate Image
skills.description: Text-to-image generation using SD 3.5 Large + T5-XXL on NVIDIA L4 GPU. $0.20 / 2 GCX.
examples: Generate a serene Japanese garden at sunset

skills.name: Generate Image Nano
skills.description: Fast concept generation via Google Imagen 3. Great for rapid iteration. $0.10 / 1 GCX.
examples: Quick concept sketch of a crystal fox

skills.name: Upscale Image
skills.description: Super-resolution using Real-ESRGAN on NVIDIA L4 GPU. 5 models (2x and 4x). $0.20 / 2 GCX.
examples: Upscale an image to 4x resolution with the anime model

skills.name: Resize Image
skills.description: Resize images to target dimensions. Modes: contain, cover, stretch. Formats: PNG, JPEG, WebP. $0.10 / 1 GCX.
examples: Resize to 512x512 cover mode as JPEG

skills.name: Enrich Metadata
skills.description: AI-powered artwork analysis via Gemini 2.5 Pro. Standard (SEO) or Premium (museum-grade Golden Codex). $0.20 / 2 GCX.
examples: Analyze artwork and generate Golden Codex metadata

skills.name: Infuse Metadata
skills.description: Embed metadata into image via ExifTool (XMP-gc, IPTC, C2PA, soulmark). $0.10 / 1 GCX.
examples: Embed Golden Codex metadata into a PNG image

skills.name: Register Hash
skills.description: Register 256-bit perceptual hash with LSH band indexing for strip-proof provenance. $0.10 / 1 GCX.
examples: Register an image's perceptual hash

skills.name: Store Permanent
skills.description: Upload to Arweave L1 for permanent, immutable storage. $1.50 / 15 GCX.
examples: Store an image permanently on Arweave

skills.name: Mint NFT
skills.description: Mint as NFT on Polygon with on-chain provenance link. $1.00 / 10 GCX.
examples: Mint an artwork as an NFT on Polygon

skills.name: Verify Provenance
skills.description: Strip-proof provenance verification via Aegis perceptual hash index. FREE.
examples: Check if an image has registered provenance

skills.name: Full Pipeline
skills.description: Complete creative pipeline: generate/upscale/enrich/infuse/register in one call. $0.50 / 5 GCX.
examples: Run full pipeline on an image

skills.name: Save Asset
skills.description: Save an image or data to personal wallet storage. 100MB free, 500 assets max. $0.10 / 1 GCX.
examples: Save my generated image as 'sunset-001'

skills.name: Get Asset
skills.description: Retrieve a stored asset from wallet storage by key. FREE.
examples: Retrieve the asset named 'sunset-001'

skills.name: List Assets
skills.description: List all assets in wallet storage with sizes and metadata. FREE.
examples: List all my stored assets

skills.name: Delete Asset
skills.description: Delete an asset from wallet storage. FREE.
examples: Delete the asset named 'sunset-001'

skills.name: Search Artworks
skills.description: Search 53K+ museum artworks from Alexandria Aeternum (7 museums). FREE.
examples: Search for impressionist landscapes from the Met

skills.name: Get Artwork
skills.description: Get Human_Standard metadata (500-1200 tokens) + signed image URL. $0.10 / 1 GCX.
examples: Get metadata for met_437419

skills.name: Get Artwork Oracle
skills.description: Get Hybrid_Premium 111-field NEST analysis (2K-6K tokens) + image. $0.20 / 2 GCX.
examples: Get deep AI analysis for met_437419

skills.name: Batch Download
skills.description: Bulk download metadata + images from Alexandria Aeternum (min 100). $5.00 / 50 GCX.
examples: Download 100 artworks starting at offset 0

skills.name: Compliance Manifest
skills.description: Get AB 2013 + EU AI Act Article 53 compliance manifests for dataset usage. FREE.
examples: Get compliance manifest for Alexandria Aeternum

skills.name: Register Wallet
skills.description: Register an EVM wallet and receive 10 FREE GCX welcome credits ($1 value). FREE.
examples: Register my wallet 0x1234...

skills.name: Check Balance
skills.description: Check GCX balance, loyalty credits, and volume tier for a wallet. FREE.
examples: Check my GCX balance
